user_goal_stage: The user is currently playing the daily Juxtastat game. One question has been answered (indicated by a red square in the progress bar), and a new question is displayed.
action_plan: The plan is to continue answering the questions in the daily Juxtastat game until all squares in the progress bar are filled, indicating completion of the game for the day. I will click on one of the two options presented for the current question.

actions.reasoning: I need to select one of the two options provided to answer the current Juxtastat question and proceed with the game.
